zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强延续上行
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD维持窄幅震荡整理结构，价格运行于6.28均线上方，整体仍处于震荡偏强格局。短线多头动能温和释放，但上攻节奏较为克制，趋势尚未进入加速阶段。

MACD维持零轴上方并出现轻微扩张，显示多头动能占优但强度有限。由于RSI缺失，仅从价格结构看，市场情绪偏中性略偏多，缺乏明显超买或超卖信号。

上方阻力关注6.46前高及6.50整数关口，若有效突破有望打开进一步上行空间。下方关键支撑位于6.28的20日均线，失守则可能回测6.20区域寻求支撑。

交易策略以回调低吸为主，接近6.28支撑可分批布局多单，止损设于6.20下方。若放量突破6.46可顺势追多，短线仍以区间突破确认作为主要操作依据。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is showing a mild short-term recovery, trading at 6.4367 after a modest 0.24% daily gain. Price is holding near the upper end of the 24-hour range, which suggests buyers are still defending the market. The pair is also above the 20-day simple moving average at 6.2870, a constructive sign that the near-term trend has improved from a neutral base into a slightly bullish structure.

Momentum looks positive, though not yet decisive. The MACD reading of 0.0311 is above zero, which typically supports the case for upward momentum, but the missing signal line limits a full crossover assessment. Without RSI data, there is less visibility into whether AVAX is overbought or oversold, so it is better to treat the move as a developing trend rather than a confirmed breakout. The market still needs follow-through.

Immediate support appears around 6.42, with stronger backing near the 20-day SMA at 6.29. If price slips below that zone, the recent bullish bias could weaken quickly and invite a move toward lower consolidation levels. On the upside, resistance sits just above the current high at 6.46, followed by a psychological extension near 6.50. A clean break above that band would improve the outlook and could attract momentum buyers.

For traders, the setup favors patience and confirmation. Aggressive buyers may consider entries on shallow pullbacks toward 6.29 to 6.32, with a stop below support to manage downside risk. More conservative participants may want to wait for a decisive close above 6.46 before chasing continuation. Until then, AVAX/USD looks range-to-slightly bullish, with upside potential limited unless volume expands.
